commentary: Market commentary for March 2026. The UK SME lending environment saw an average unsecured rate of 8.4%, representing the general risk appetite of alternative lenders during this period. Asset finance volumes reached £3.3bn as businesses continued to invest in equipment and machinery. Specialist approval rates hovered around 69%, reflecting tighter credit conditions and increased lender scrutiny.
